QueryTheListOfElasticNetworkCards.vpcId: VPC ID to which the elastic network card belongs
QueryTheListOfElasticNetworkCards.instanceId: ID of the instance the elastic network card is attached to
QueryTheListOfElasticNetworkCards.name: Name of the elastic network card
QueryTheListOfElasticNetworkCards.privateIpAddress: Private IP (IPv4) address of the elastic network card; supports single or multiple IPs (comma-separated); single IP supports suffix fuzzy match, multiple IPs require exact match
QueryTheListOfElasticNetworkCards.marker: Starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryTheListOfElasticNetworkCards.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000; default is 1000
